programme.title: 1:1. Aktuālā intervija
programme.desc: Raidījumā "1:1" [viens pret vienu] satiekas sabiedrībā zināma personība un žurnālists. Raidījums skaidro, analizē un ļauj izprast sabiedrībai nozīmīgas norises visdažādākajās dzīves jomās Latvijā un pasaulē, izprast personības nozīmīgumu, atbildību šo procesu virzībā. Viesi izvēlēti, ņemot vērā tā brīža aktualitātes vai arī konkrētās personas iespējamo ietekmi uz notikumiem nākotnē, – valsts pirmās amatpersonas, biznesa, kultūras un nevalstiskā sektora pārstāvji. Raidījumu vada žurnālists Gundars Rēders.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: Reiz Jēkabpils apvidū, starptelpā starp Eiropas pilsētām, mazliet uz Raiņa pusi no Arvja Vigula mājām rakstnieks Fallijs sapņos būvēja mākslu templi. Daile un spēks, un milzums pieveica dekadentu Falliju. Bet par viņu interesējas rakstnieks un tulkotājs Viguls. Viņš meklē telpās, kas atrodas starp gadalaikiem, ielām un pieturām, starp divām pasaulēm. Viņš lasa iedomīgo dzejoli, kurš ir tik skaists, ka Raimonds Pauls varētu tam rakstīt mūziku, bet dzejolim neviens neraksta pat vēstules. Tas kā augs izlikts ārpus siltumnīcas salā - vai dzejolim nosals lapas?

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: De facto
programme.desc: LTV Ziņu dienesta veidotajā analītiski pētnieciskajā raidījumā "De Facto" skatītājiem nozīmīgus jautājumus izmeklē žurnālisti Matīss Arnicāns, Inga Šņore, Laine Fedotova, Ivo Leitāns un Ella Semjonova. "De Facto" uzmanības lokā ir netaisnības un pretrunas – ne tikai korupcijas, interešu konfliktu un citu noziedzīgu nodarījumu lietas, bet arī sabiedrībai būtisku cieņpilnas attieksmes un ētiskas rīcības pārkāpumu izmeklēšana.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Tradīcijas, prāts un konkurence - šovakar finālspēlē piedalās studentu mūžorganizāciju biedri, kuri pierāda, ka akadēmiskās vērtības un sacensību gars var iet roku rokā. Komandu kapteiņi: Ivars Dimdiņš un Beāte Lielmane. Ivars Dimdiņš - komandas kapteinis. Vēsturnieks, projektu vadītājs, gids un lektors, šobrīd - Ādažu novada pašvaldības Carnikavas Novadpētniecības centrā. Pēdējā laikā darbojas arī militārās vēstures tūrisma lauciņā. Aizrauj aktīva līdzjušana futbolam, ceļošana un politikas norises. "Austruma" savietis, iestājies 2013. gadā un vairāk nekā 10 gadus darbojies vienības valdē, arī to vadot. Kristians Krievāns - vokālais pedagogs un muzejpedagogs Latvijas Nacionālajā rakstniecības un mūzikas muzejā, specializējas Dziesmu svētku vēsturē, ir akadēmiskās vienības "Austrums" vecbiedrs. Strādā kā vokālais pedagogs gan privāti, gan Lutera draudzes korī, "Jasmīnas korī" un Liepājas "Reverberācijā". Dažreiz padzied solo. Dievina prokrastināciju un gudras sarunas, sevišķi, ja kāds klausās. Nepatīk ziema, un garšo saldumi. Jānis Barons - akadēmiskās vienības "Austrums" vecbiedrs, "Austrumā" kopš 1997. gada, filologs. Gandrīz visu mūžu darbojies ar tekstiem, tulkojot un rediģējot. Ja saskaita visas valodas, kuras mācījies, sanāk divciparu skaitlis. Ir Latvijas Erudītu līgā. Patīk uzzināt un noglabāt prāta dzīlēs dažādus faktus. Dzimis svētdienas pēcpusdienā, tāpēc laisks pēc dabas. Beāte Lielmane - komandas kapteine, akadēmiskās vienības "Latviete" vecākā. Maģistra grāds vēsturē, vēstures doktora zinātniskā grāda kandidāte Latvijas Universitātē. Beāte aizrautīgi medī interesantus faktus viktorīnām, izdevīgus atradumus humpalās un pasākumus, kas bagātina gan garu, gan miesu. Atklāj sev neredzētas filmas, grāmatas un mūziku un ir viegli ievelkama jaunās avantūrās, it īpaši intelektuālās. Vēlme uzvarēt atkal atvedusi uz "V.I.P." spēli. Lāsma Gaile - akadēmiskās vienības "Latviete" vecākās vietniece, kapteines cīņu biedre viktorīnās, strādā komunikācijas nozarē, tomēr ikdienu piepilda ne vien darbs, bet arī citas aizraušanās - viktorīnas, literatūra, kino, pārgājieni un virkne citu interešu. Kopš pēdējās "V.I.P." spēles kategoriski atsakās ēst Cēzara salātus. Lāsmas somā vienmēr ir grāmata, ko palasīt. Paulīna Latsone - vēstures studiju biedre kapteinei. Joprojām studē, šobrīd Nacionālajā Aizsardzības akadēmijā. Paulīna jau 25 gadus aktīvi darbojas skautu un gaidu kustībā, patīk būt dabā, iet pārgājienos un braukt ar velo. Ir akadēmiskās vienības "Latviete" prāta spēļu komandas dalībniece.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: How did Rome rise to dominate so much of the ancient world? Off the coast of Sicily, investigators discover traces of a crucial naval battle. Using divers, an underwater robot and a crane, they haul a long lost battleship relic to the surface. In Terracina, south of Rome, a team of archaeologists dig inside an ancient mountaintop temple, and in Carthage, Tunisia, clues reveal how one deadly rivalry tilted the scales of power in favour of Rome.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: The series that follows international teams of archaeologists as they embark on a season of excavations to unravel the secrets of life in the Roman Empire. How did the Colosseum - an arena for bloody gladiatorial battles - become the greatest symbol of the Roman Empire? Archaeologists venture into the Colosseums ruins, and launch digs across the Empire, to hunt for clues. As teams descend into hidden tunnels and unearth long-lost amphitheatres in Tuscany and Britain, they piece together the surprising truth about Romes iconic Colosseum.

programme.title: Ultimate Supercar
programme.desc: A must see for petrolheads and connoisseurs, this series takes the viewer behind the scenes at some of the most legendary automobile manufacturers on the planet to reveal how their supercars are designed, engineered and constructed. From the DBS Superleggera of the last truly independent marque, Aston Marton, to Ferraris best-selling Portofino and from rappers favourite, the Bentley Continental GT. to the over-the-top Lamborghini Aventador SVJ, we learn what makes these beautiful machines unique and how it is the small, individual engineering secrets that make all the difference and ensure their mythical status and economic success.

programme.title: Ultimate Supercar
programme.desc: A must see for petrolheads and connoisseurs, this series takes the viewer behind the scenes at some of the most legendary automobile manufacturers on the planet to reveal how their supercars are designed, engineered and constructed. From the DBS Superleggera of the last truly independent marque, Aston Marton, to Ferraris best-selling Portofino and from rappers favourite, the Bentley Continental GT. to the over-the-top Lamborghini Aventador SVJ, we learn what makes these beautiful machines unique and how it is the small, individual engineering secrets that make all the difference and ensure their mythical status and economic success.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Explore a world never seen before - a world hidden under miles of water, the landscape of the Atlantic sea bed. What do we really know about this more than 41 million square miles of open ocean, and why is its floor covered with wrecks? Are there strange, supernatural forces or deadly forces of mother nature at work here? And can science help explain the reasons behind the large number of sunken ships and aircrafts? Join expeditions to dive long-lost vessels, and follow the scientists who are probing the darkest and deepest corners of this underwater world. We make use of the latest technology and sonar data to "drain" the Bermuda Triangle, and long lost vessels scatted across the Atlantic sea floor. Computer generated, three-dimensional maps will offer the first glimpse of these mysteries.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air traffic controllers hear an explosion when Air Algerie Flight 6289 lifts off from a remote desert airport. And moments later, the Boeing 737-200 crashes in the Sahara. An intense fire ravages the fuselage, instantly killing all but one of the 103 people on board. For an international team of investigators, its clear the left engine exploded after liftoff—and that a fatigue crack eventually explains why. Whats less obvious is why the highly-experienced crew of the state-owned national carrier was unable to keep their aircraft in the sky. Single-engine failures are infinitely survivable, and the pilots should have been able to recover by working together. Investigators ultimately find their answer in the CVR and in a toxic tug-of-war between a belligerent captain working at cross purposes with Algerias first-ever female airline pilot.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass, injure and humiliate yourself when cliff diving, swinging a sledgehammer and riding a motorised scooter.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: In an airport where time is money, a routine tail-fin repair on a $208 million dollar A330 jet hangs in the balance; two trainee Airside Operations Controllers have to guide multi-million dollar aircraft precisely to their parking stands; and with the airport near full capacity handling 57 million passengers a year, the new $3.2 billion concourse is trialed to test if its on schedule to receive 15 million new passengers and 33 of the worlds biggest passenger jets - the mighty $389 million dollar Airbus A380.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Brand new: The ninth series of the award-winning Car S.O.S continues, as everyones favourite petrolheads Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw continue their mission to seek out classic cars with deserving owners. In this episode, the boys head to Lincolnshire where the embodiment of a once luxurious era awaits - a 1929 Rolls Royce Doctors Coupe. The car belongs to engineer and mother of five Emily, and it has been in her family for over 40 years - although most of that time her Dad was trying to restore it. When Emilys Dad died recently and left the car in her hands, Emily had no idea what to do with it and so this luxurious leviathan of a car ended up rotting away in her garage.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: Ultimate Factories also known as Megafactories is an American documentary television series that premiered in 2006 on the National Geographic Channel. The program explores the inner workings of factories worldwide. Each episode profiles the machinery and manpower behind each factorys main product, featuring close-ups, breakdowns, interviews, and side stories to show the sequence of events to produce the product in the factory. Hoff Productions was one of the principal producers of this highly successful series. It also airs in non-US markets as Megafactories.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: We begin with an in-depth look at one of the most prolific materials in the world: the science of concrete. Why are so many of todays concrete structures cracking and failing? Why are so many ancient concrete structures still standing when todays crumble after only decades? Next its a trip to Scotland, home to the Glasgow Tower. The structure is the tallest fully rotating tower in the world, but few have ever seen it rotate. Fire, broken bearings, poor design and too much wind are just some of the reasons this structure has been branded an embarrassing white elephant on the banks of the River Clyde.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: We begin with the tragic collapse of the Ponte Morandi (Morandi Bridge) in Genoa, 2018. Multiple camera angles capture the bridge crashing down in a rainstorm as vehicles drive across the iconic structure. An investigation uncovers a tale of neglect and aging concrete. The Millennium Tower was known as the most prestigious new condo tower in San Francisco. Now its known for something else: its sinking. Its leaning, the concrete is cracking, the glass is blowing out of the windows. How could a luxury complex of multi-million dollar residences fail so soon after construction?

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Episode one begins on an unremarkable Dutch canal. What we see unfold, however, is anything but. Its one of the most dramatic construction catastrophes in recent history: a double telescopic crane collapse, a barge capsizing and a 187-ton bridge span all careening into a quiet residential neighbourhood resulting in the total destruction of dozens of homes. The reason? A combination of wind, lack of balance and crane operator error. From there, we travel to Asia, where some of the worlds biggest construction sites fail before construction even begins. We witness a variety of construction site collapses: massive holes in the ground that implode in dramatic fashion, hurling retaining walls, roads and equipment dozens of metres below into a pit. Substandard soil conditions and reclaimed land seem to be the biggest reasons for these fails.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. Unraveling the complex mystery is a painstaking process that takes months—and sometimes years—of detective work. The twisted wreckage at the crash site tells part of the story; investigators can use it to learn about the final seconds of a flight and rule out mechanical failures. The flight data and cockpit voice recorders are critical, but they dont always reveal what happened. It almost always takes a tragic combination of factors to bring down an airplane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: This new series follows international teams of archaeologists as they embark on a season of excavations to unravel the secrets of life in the Roman Empire. Crawling beneath Pompeii, unearthing an enormous lost coliseum, and hauling a 2000-year-old battleship ram from the depths of the ocean, they race to unlock the secrets of this ancient civilisation. In the series opener, archaeologists embark on new digs in Pompeii, to unravel the stories of the people who lived and died there. They race against the clock to unearth a sacrificial skull, uncover clues from the tomb and the mummified body of a curiously wealthy freed slave, and venture into stiflingly narrow tunnels beneath the central bathhouse.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: Buried beneath Rome lies a forgotten treasure: the Golden House - a vast palace built in the first century AD. It was the most extravagant construction in the history of Rome. Why was it buried? And what can its fate reveal about its builder - Romes most notorious emperor - Nero? As experts race to save the remains of the Golden House, archaeologists uncover new clues to its fate and its connection to Neros reputation.

programme.title: Endurance
programme.desc: In a legendary feat of leadership and perseverance, Antarctic explorer Ernest Shackleton kept his crew alive for over a year despite losing their ship in frigid pack ice. A century later, a team of explorers sets out to find the sunken ship. These landmark expeditions, bound by shared grit and determination, bookend one of historys greatest sagas of survival and the power of the human spirit.

programme.title: Ocean with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough draws on a lifetime of experience to reveal Earths most spectacular underwater habitats, showing that were in the greatest age of Ocean discovery and highlighting its vital importance. While exposing the Oceans biggest challenges, Attenboroughs message is one of hope: the opportunity for marine life recovery on an unprecedented scale is within reach.

programme.title: Airport Security: Brazil
programme.desc: Federal Police at Sao Paulo International Airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. Their main threat, cocaine smuggling. Agents arrest two different carriers on a flight to Ethiopia. One has cocaine in shampoo bottles; the other, in fabric dye containers. Intel flags a man heading to Hong Kong. He has capsules taped to his body - and possibly other places as well. A woman has two empty backpacks in her suitcase, and both hide cocaine.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. A womans bag is flagged in the x-ray area but shes already been inspected twice. Police must decide whether to tear the bag apart or let her go. An Italian man claims not to understand the police. He may be telling the truth. Or he may be trying to evade the law. A shipment of childrens toys may hide a stash of cocaine.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. Police rush to handle a rare incident on a domestic flight: something suspicious in a Serbian citizens bag. Agents find liquid cocaine disguised in drink bottles in another mans bag. A passenger without luggage reappears carrying a suitcase and agents rush to investigate. Counterfeit cash is uncovered in the mail facility.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: This new series follows international teams of archaeologists as they embark on a season of excavations to unravel the secrets of life in the Roman Empire. programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Producing a savory meal thats ready in three minutes, Nongshim is South Koreas top selling brand, and its giant California facility alone produces over 200 million ramen noodle bowls per year. It takes an "octopus", a "guillotine", and a chocolate waterfall to produce Look candy bars--the classic American treat that combines chewy peanut-filled nougat with a delectable dark chocolate coating. Though the company admits its name is half-baked, Semifreddis bakery produces fluffy and flawless Challah--the hand-braided egg bread thats kosher, doughy, and delicious.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: At Del Montes massive green bean operation in Markesan, Wisconsin, garden-fresh beans are always picked and packed on the same day at a staggering rate of 45 tons an hour. Steeped in Italian history, Barillas Iowa facility uses wheat, water, and state-of-the-art machines to produce authentic bowtie shaped farfalle pasta by the truckload. In Sacramento, California, 60,000 gallons of Marleys Mellow Mood iced tea are produced daily, and every single drop is infused with the spirit of reggae.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: More than a million passengers pass through Dubai International Airport every week. Behind the scenes 60,000 people from across the globe are hard at work. From ensuring the safety of the runway surface to dealing with drunken passengers, this episode of "Ultimate Airport" offers a rare chance to get to know the unsung men and women carrying out the often overlooked but vital tasks that make this multi-billion dollar airport run smoothly.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Dubai International is in the global race to be the worlds biggest airport. A massive new concourse for the worlds largest fleet of A380s uses over a 150 million man-hours and 930 thousand cubic meters of concrete. Unafraid of new challenges, the airport was the first ever to close two runways back to back for construction. In the words of its Engineering CEO, "the bar is getting higher and higher." There is no room for failure in Dubai.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: As thunder rumbles and rain pours, maintenance teams carry out urgent post winter repairs, but lightning forces them inside. A hardworking ground support engineer struggles to keep flights on time in the worsening rain. Repairs on a faulty 787 go to the wire. A ramp team has an hour to re-load an entire planes cargo, and two dogs receive special treatment enroute to their loved ones.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Spring break brings a surge in passenger numbers and added pressures on airport staff and infrastructure: heavy bags rip a section of the baggage conveyor belt which needs fixing before the afternoon rush. A low-cost-holiday jet with millions of miles on the clock needs a new engine. Staff must race passengers from a delayed flight to their jet headed for the Caribbean, and an elite restaurant along with staff on the apron feel the heat as passenger numbers soar.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: For 20 years, Lexus has been synonymous with quiet, efficient, luxury. Now they have launched their first supercar - the Lexus LFA. Going from 0 to 100kph in under four seconds, its anything but understated. This is the construction story behind the Japanese supercar. Hand built at the LFA Works in Toyota City, Japan, this cars body is 65% carbon fibre and powered by one of the highest revving production engine on the road. At $375,000 its also one of the most luxuriously priced Japanese road cars ever.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: Love has always been one of the great drivers of history - a drunk driver, without a licence. Yet love hurtles on, costing royalty their heads, generals their victories, and many of us our sanity. We explore why, from Liz Taylor to Attila the Hun; the pain is never enough to stop us looking for love.

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: History is full of revolutions, industrial, sexual and the big one, political. And each one starts in a different way. Every once in a while, holding hands and singing can be more effective than tanks and barricades. But even if your cause and motives are pure to begin with, how can you still end up on the wrong side of history?

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: Our modern world didnt just happen it was invented through inspiration, perseverance and dumb luck. We learn that great inventors often build their ideas on the shoulders of those that went before or just steal them. And its not always clear who came up with every world changing invention, even TV.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Ireland doesnt take up much room on the map, but few places have such a celebrated identity; over 70 million people around the world claim Irish heritage. Hannah Fry goes beyond the pubs and parades to discover what it really means to be Irish today. Along the windswept coast of Donegal Bay, she dives into Irelands surprising surfing scene, where dramatic geology is forging a new bond with the sea. She places a bet at the Punchestown races, exploring how a connection to the land became a multi-billion Euro industry. In a moment of personal discovery, Hannah uncovers her own Irish DNA and how her family history holds clues to Irish identity. As her journey ends, Hannah steps into the spotlight to try her hand at one of Irelands most cherished traditions: storytelling.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits Iceland to discover how this stark, treeless island became a global success story. On the geologically active Reykjanes Peninsula, she meets scientists whose lava-flow predictions saved the world-famous Blue Lagoon spa from destruction, and in Hengill she sees how a futuristic algae farm is fuelled by geothermal power - and imagination. A dip in the countrys oldest swimming pool reveals how Icelands unusually small gene pool is helping advance global health, while a horseback ride across a black sand landscape immortalised in the Icelandic sagas shows how Viking heritage continues to inspire creativity. The Icelanders Hannah encounters dont just live on the land; they negotiate with it. Their collective determination and adaptability has forged an island of ideas - and a tourist magnet the world cannot resist.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In Californias Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft designed for sub-orbital flight. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earths atmosphere, approaching the speed of sound, it breaks apart and falls from the sky. With the future of commercial space travel hanging in the balance, its up to investigators to figure out what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: Hadrians Wall is the biggest structure the Romans ever built. Stretching 73 miles across Britain, it once defined the northern edge of the greatest empire the world had seen. Now experts investigate the Wall, its forts, gatehouses and garrison towns, to reveal how civilisation and culture grew on Romes wild frontier. Their surprising discoveries show what life - and death - were like on the dynamic and ever-changing edge of empire.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: The deadly volcanic eruption that buried Pompeii in AD79 also claimed another victim: Herculaneum. Positioned closer to the Vesuvius crater, this seaside town was covered in ash five times as thick as Pompeii, yet miraculously is even better preserved. Now, the discovery of an intact skeleton here, the first excavated in 25 years, helps investigators piece together the final hours of Herculaneum and unravel why Vesuvius stuck so violently here.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: Dive into the awe-inspiring world of Dutch engineering, where human ingenuity meets the relentless power of nature. From a remarkable sideways ship launch, to the nations largest flood barrier, each stop reveals a story of engineering innovation. Then, step back in time to uncover the ingenious, water management secrets hidden within the iconic windmills of Kinderdijk.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey through Germanys greatest feats of engineering. From the awe-inspiring technology thats allowing engineers to build rail lines 40m below Munich city centre, to the secrets of a record breaking swing bridge across the river Ems. Marvel at twin ship lifts that carry cargo vessels 40m in the air and step back in time to visit restoration work at the worlds tallest church.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: During a regional commuter hop in New Zealand, the pilots of Eagle Airways Flight 2300 struggle to lower their landing gear. They circle the airport to troubleshoot the issue. Low on fuel, they have no choice but to eventually attempt a wheels-up landing. With emergency crews standing by, their twin-engine turboprop gently touches down, slides along the centre of the runway, and comes to a stop—remarkably with no injuries and minimal damage to the aircraft. With a potential disaster narrowly averted, investigators look into what could have caused the landing gear to fail. They soon track a hydraulic leak to a minor part with a major flaw. When they later test the entire fleet of Beechcraft turboprops, they uncover a systemic issue thats endangering passengers worldwide.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: An out-of-control turboprop breaks apart while trying to land at Dusseldorf airport, instantly killing everyone on board. German investigators locate every piece of the wreckage within the huge crash site, then painstakingly reconstruct the entire plane in order to determine what went wrong on board Nuremberg Flight 108. Investigators soon uncover a piece of the wreckage with telltale signs of a lightning strike. And as they dig deeper, find conclusive evidence that the powerful jolt jumped from the fuselage to the electrical system, causing a total power failure that disabled critical instruments and plunged the cockpit into darkness. Faced with a one-in-a-million disaster scenario no one saw coming, the disoriented crew lost control of their aircraft. Investigators conclude there was nothing they could have done to save their plane.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Joined by linguist Dr. Mary Walworth and local marine ecologist John Aini, Will travels to the South Pacific on an expedition to a remote island threatened by rising seas. What begins as an exploration into an incredible marine paradise quickly transforms into a truly revelatory journey for Will about his own history as they record a lost language spoken by only five people.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will travels deep into the Kalahari Desert to meet the San people, one of the oldest hunter-gatherer groups on Earth. To discover the secret to their enduring success, he must join them on a hunt in one of the most inhospitable places on the planet. Led by local San bushman guide Kane Motswana, its not long before he realizes hes entirely unsuited to this adventure.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: Hadrians Wall is the biggest structure the Romans ever built. Stretching 73 miles across Britain, it once defined the northern edge of the greatest empire the world had seen. Now experts investigate the Wall, its forts, gatehouses and garrison towns, to reveal how civilisation and culture grew on Romes wild frontier. programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The latest sonar technology reveals shipwrecks as never seen before. As water and land drain away: a secret beneath Manhattans skyline, an earth-shattering feat of engineering, a record-breaking icon and a casualty of WWI stealth warfare. Examining these hidden giants can explain New York Citys meteoric rise to bustling world metropolis. A city that cant be kept down, forever pushing forward, with true grit and determination.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In Californias Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft designed for sub-orbital flight. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earths atmosphere, approaching the speed of sound, it breaks apart and falls from the sky. With the future of commercial space travel hanging in the balance, its up to investigators to figure out what went wrong.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: At Del Montes massive green bean operation in Markesan, Wisconsin, garden-fresh beans are always picked and packed on the same day at a staggering rate of 45 tons an hour. Steeped in Italian history, Barillas Iowa facility uses wheat, water, and state-of-the-art machines to produce authentic bowtie shaped farfalle pasta by the truckload. In Sacramento, California, 60,000 gallons of Marleys Mellow Mood iced tea are produced daily, and every single drop is infused with the spirit of reggae.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: After losing his mother and sister at one year old, he taught himself to hunt, but now has to deal with his other thieving relatives. Hes survived this long in spite of difficulty and knocks down all stereotypes.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: How outrageous can the animal kingdom get? Whether its out-of-bounds behavior or savage instincts run amok, when animals act out theyre a force to be reckoned with. From the mysterious depths of the deep blue sea to the jungles untamed edge, see just how rough, rowdy, and lawless Mother Natures most unruly creatures can be.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: When fight or flight instincts kick in, animals will do anything to survive. From heroic acts of bravery to narrow escapes and near misses, expect the unexpected when creatures encounter the animal kingdoms strangest curve balls.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: From the grizzly Alaskan frontier to the sweet melody of an indoor pooch, these animals never stop showing their true colors. Theyre the most amazing, confounding and disturbing encounters on Animals Gone Wild: Off the Wall.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: The Brotherhood. An undeniable band-of-brothers that enhances their odds of survival against the larger super-predators of the savanna. But no partnership comes without its challenges and leadership amongst the group is not a done deal either.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: How outrageous can the animal kingdom get? Whether its out-of-bounds behavior or savage instincts run amok, when animals act out theyre a force to be reckoned with. From the mysterious depths of the deep blue sea to the jungles untamed edge, see just how rough, rowdy, and lawless Mother Natures most unruly creatures can be.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: When fight or flight instincts kick in, animals will do anything to survive. From heroic acts of bravery to narrow escapes and near misses, expect the unexpected when creatures encounter the animal kingdoms strangest curve balls.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australias incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the oceans depths and uses science to identify Australias ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: After getting the tractor stuck in mud, Charles and Ben need a quick solution to plant hayseed in their field to provide food for their incoming animals. The Pol family must quickly figure out why their field is so wet even though it hasnt rained in days. Meanwhile, Dr. Pol helps Charles and Beth set up their first beehive colonies on the new farm.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Americas Wild Spaces
programme.desc: This show explores the unbridled natural beauty of Americas national parks and highlights some of the most awe-inspiring scenery on the planet. Travelling beyond the more conventional tourist hot-spots, the viewer is transported to the hidden wonders of Americas wild spaces. Episodes include joining a scientific exploration of the 277 mile long Grand Canyon, studying its geological history, exploring the microscopic colonies of vegetation and examining its unique creatures; journeying through the Everglades, a 1.5 million acre home to strange creatures, carnivorous plants, amphibious birds and fish that can breathe air; and navigating across the northwest archipelago of Hawaii following a team of diving scientists as they inspect the unique aquaeous flora and fauna.

programme.title: Americas Wild Spaces

programme.desc: The worlds most ferocious land predators are pitted against each other in a series of challenges that push them to their limits.

programme.title: Future Cat
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. With cutting edge visual effects, we explore far-off future challenges that may await the big cats. Leading experts discuss possible extreme planetary scenarios and the adaptations big cats would to need to make in order to survive.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics
programme.desc: Explore the many ways wild cats go in for the kill. Cats rarely seen in action, such as the marbled cat, the fishing cat and the sand cat, will all be featured in Cat Attack-tics. Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.title: Big cat odyssey
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the best moments that Dereck and Beverly Joubert have captured during their 30-year quest to get close to big cats.

programme.title: Big Cat Planet
programme.desc: Big cats may seem like the ultimate wildlife cliche, but theyre locked in a global battle for survival. Powerful and dangerous, they now clash with humans more than ever. This sweeping safari reveals their resilience and adaptability. Cheetahs hunt from cars, jaguars stalk prey underwater and around boats, and Indias lions prowl city streets. Familiar species and behaviors take on new drama, with revelations that reaffirm why big cats remain natures most formidable predators.

programme.title: Big Cat Games
programme.desc: The worlds most ferocious land predators are pitted against each other in a series of challenges that push them to their limits.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

programme.title: Lake Tanganyika: Africas Blue Heart
programme.desc: Lake Tanganyika, one of the largest lakes on earth, combines two different yet equally magical worlds: an untouched wilderness along the shores, home to chimpanzees, elephants and antelopes and a spectacularly diverse underwater universe.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

Focusing on Australias incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the oceans depths and uses science to identify Australias ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Big Cat Games
programme.desc: The worlds most ferocious land predators are pitted against each other in a series of challenges that push them to their limits.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: Predator Fail: When Prey Attacks
programme.desc: Animals such as the lion, the crocodile, and the shark are rightly considered to be among the most deadly predators on the planet, expert hunting and killing machines. However, their natural instincts, experience and physical abilities are still no guarantee for success. And who doesnt enjoy the thrill of an underdog prey being able to outsmart or outmanouver one of these formidable killers? This series exmaines what happens when these top carnivores get it wrong, proving that they can make mistakes just like the rest of us. From a lion making four jumps to tackle a gazelle to a black mambas aim being slightly awry!

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Americas Wild Spaces
programme.desc: This show explores the unbridled natural beauty of Americas national parks and highlights some of the most awe-inspiring scenery on the planet. Travelling beyond the more conventional tourist hot-spots, the viewer is transported to the hidden wonders of Americas wild spaces. Episodes include joining a scientific exploration of the 277 mile long Grand Canyon, studying its geological history, exploring the microscopic colonies of vegetation and examining its unique creatures; journeying through the Everglades, a 1.5 million acre home to strange creatures, carnivorous plants, amphibious birds and fish that can breathe air; and navigating across the northwest archipelago of Hawaii following a team of diving scientists as they inspect the unique aquaeous flora and fauna.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Documentary series featuring fearsome fights between the biggest and the baddest animals on planet. Watch the animals fighting for their food, territory, rights and life. Follow the drama and adrenaline of the toughest and fearcest fights in savannah, jungles and water. It is an ultimate survival with no rules whatsoever. Uncover the extraordinary motivations and strategies used by the animal world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Elephants
programme.desc: This episode reveals the secrets of Namibias last remaining desert elephants. When droughts, sandstorms and even floods threaten them, their shared knowledge passed down from generation to generation keeps them alive.

programme.title: Secrets of the Elephants
programme.desc: Big families and strong relationships are the basis of success for Savanna elephants. As we uncover their secrets we start to understand their remarkable language. Its not just noise, they communicate like us.

programme.title: Secrets of the Elephants
programme.desc: As humans encroach ever further into their environment, Asian elephants are being forced to adjust to new challenges. We explore how these savvy animals have learned to break down electric fences and strike deals with farmers.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Documentary series featuring fearsome fights between the biggest and the baddest animals on planet. Watch the animals fighting for their food, territory, rights and life. Follow the drama and adrenaline of the toughest and fearcest fights in savannah, jungles and water. It is an ultimate survival with no rules whatsoever. Uncover the extraordinary motivations and strategies used by the animal world.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In an action packed episode of Animal Fight Club we reveal what happens when the Animal Kingdoms most vicious species fight tooth and claw in the deadliest of conflicts. With exclusive user generated content and footage from top wildlife filmmakers, this episode sheds new light on the fiercest fights Mother Nature has to offer, proving that its not always the animal you expect that ends up coming out on top …

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: "Animal Fight Club: Power Struggles" reveals how the even the most epic battles can be won or lost in a split second. In the world of wild animal fights, nothing is ever certain. Whether an animal is fighting for food, shelter or for survival itself, there are no guarantees. Sometimes even strength of numbers is not enough. In this episode we see a female leopard fight a bigger male for her lunch and her life, discover the complex competition amongst the worlds largest Great Apes and see how a Nile Monitor Lizard can turn its tail into a show stopping weapon.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators: Compilation
programme.desc: Our rivers and oceans are ruthless battlefields, constantly testing the bravery of even the biggest and deadliest carnivores. Regardless of temperature, depth or terrain, every marine habitat calls for unique body designs, exquisitely evolved senses, and outrageously complex - or bizarre - tactics for success

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar komandu pārvācas uz Celtnieklīci, kur viņi dzīvo, spēlējas un būvē visu, kas vien nepieciešams.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora uzzina, ka viņas vecmamma nav svinējusi savus Pieaugšanas svētkus, un sarīko viņai pārsteiguma ballīti ar īpašu kleitu, diadēmu un kurpēm! Doras draugam Koko nav aizraujoša stāsta, ar ko izklaidēt biedrus, tāpēc viņi dodas pie Pastāstu koka!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rivera grib uzņemt krītošas zvaigznes foto, tāpēc kucēni ceļ observatoriju. Kucēni apmaldās uz dabas takas un rod veidu, kā nokļūt mājās.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pirmās Celtnieklīča bibliotēkas būvēšana ir bišu pilna. Tas pieprasa īpaši saldu celtniecības risinājumu. / Vectēvs Grants māca Čārdžeram visus savus labākos deju soļus lielām deju sacensībām. Vai noklīdušas disko bumbas dēļ viņi neiegūs pirmo vietu?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēnu iemīļotajām grāmatām iznācis turpinājums! Tām nav vietas bibliotēkā, tāpēc kucēniem jābūt radošiem!

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais izturas dīvaini. Ko viņš slēpj? Barbabērni darīs visu, lai to uzzinātu. Barbapapas izlemj taupīt elektrību, taču viņu ieceri izjauc Barbagudrais un Barbabella, kas izgudrojuši slepenu elektrību patērējošu projektu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni pielipuši pie televizora, tāpēc vecāki mudina viņus veidot raidījumus. Barbapapas apmeklē evolūcijas muzeju. Programmā: Zemes radīšana, Pirmskembrija perioda zemūdene un... dinozauri!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei. Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu. Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Suņi uzzina, ka Celtne ir slepena skeitošanas zvaigzne! Bet, būvējot skeitparku, viņiem jārisina problēma ar cementa maisījumu. // Pilsētā ieradīsies Čārdžera mīļākā dziedātāja Sjerra Spīdošā... Ja suņi spēs uzbūvēt tuneli viņas turnejas autobusam!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Darbīga bebra dēļ Celtnieklīcī pazūd elektrība! Lai to atkal pieslēgtu, komandai jāuzceļ vaininiekam jauna mītne. Pilsētas palīgu gājiena dienā Ātrmeistars sabojā ceļu. Suņukiem ar steigu jālabo viņa kaitējums.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Zābaciņš un Dora dodas uz Banānkalnu, lai nogādātu Isai dāvanu - Zābaciņa apgleznotu puķu podu! Dora kopā ar draugiem rīko dzimšanas dienas pārsteiguma ballīti Garnadzim. Ceļā uz svinībām Garnadzis mēģina nočiept pats savu dāvanu!

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Pēc piedzīvotām likstām Barbabravo vairs nemaz nespēj pārtapt. Visa ģimene dodas viņam palīgā. Barbabravo nespēj nosēdēt mierā un ilgi koncentrēties vienai nodarbei. Barbalala piedāvā iemācīt viņam kontroli. Vai viņai izdosies?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Reksu ģimene dodas ceļojumā cauri galaktikai, lai nokļūtu Raķešpasaulē. Tims un Kaja cīnās par Terijas rezerves biļeti uz Kosmoslendu. Tims, Tija un Tomijs rīko talantu šovu, bet nevar izlemt, kurš uzstāsies pirmais.

programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni ir sajūsmā, kad viņu mīļākā TV zvaigzne Henks Hammers grib redzēt, kā viņi strādā. Kapteinis Turbo ir sagādājis pārsteigumu. Kad saceļas migla, komandai ir jāuzceļ bāka.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: Ķepu patruļa ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā,

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dorai, Zābaciņam un Benijam jādodas cauri lietusmežam, lai nogādātu Benija vecmammai lielu, skaistu piena kūku. Dora palīdz Fiestas trio noskaidrot, kas rada skaļo, savādo troksni, kura dēļ viņi pazaudējuši savus instrumentus.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus.

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Haizivsuns domā, ka neiederas ne ar suņiem, ne haizivīm, ne cilvēkiem, bet Makss viņu uzmundrina.

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Makss ir ieplānojis jautru dienu ar Haizivsuni, bet Haizivsuns ir izklaidīgs, jo ir atradis karti, kas var aizvest pie citiem haizivsuņiem!

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Haizivsuns ir apņēmies uzzināt, no kurienes ir nācis, bet dīvaini laika apstākļi un mežonīgas jūras traucē viņam ar komandu atrast citus haizivsuņus

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo aizmirsa nodot bibliotēkas grāmatu. Bibliotekārs Misters Stingrais šodien ciemojas pie Barbatēta, tāpēc Barbabo izlemj aizbēgt. Barbamamma grib, lai barbabērni uzkopj savas istabas. Viņi slēpjas, lai izvairītos no garlaicīgā darba.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbapapa un Lolita ceļo gaisa balonā, bet vētra viņus aiznes uz vientuļu salu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad projektam vajadzīga palīdzība, kucēnus apciemo Skaja no Piedzīvojumu līča. Iejaucas Ātrmeistars, un Skajai ar Rabla komandu jāpieliek visi spēki, lai glābtu situāciju.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad ceļojošā veterinārārste daktere Diva nevar laikā veikt visu Celtnieklīcī dzīvojošo dzīvnieku apskati, Rabla komanda zina, kā jārīkojas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais izturas dīvaini. Ko viņš slēpj? Barbabērni darīs visu, lai to uzzinātu. Barbapapas izlemj taupīt elektrību, taču viņu ieceri izjauc Barbagudrais un Barbabella, kas izgudrojuši slepenu elektrību patērējošu projektu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbazū gatavs palīdzēt, bet Barbagudrais un Barbabella ļaunprātīgi izmanto viņa labestību un padara viņu traku. Barbazū nejauši atklāj spēju atdarināt Barbatēti. Viņš to izmanto, lai sadalītu darbus brāļiem un māsām. Vai viņi to uzzinās?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad komanda uzbūvē īpašu limonādes stendu Lūkasam un Lilija, īgnais Ātrmeistars ieripina to Celtnieklīča ielās. Kāpēc bebrs Krančijs šķērso ceļu? Jo Rabla komanda būvē tiltu, lai palīdzētu viņam nokļūt ceļa otrā pusē.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīci ir pārņēmis noslēpums. Kad pēkšņi pazūd pilsētnieku skulptūra, Rabla komandai pievienojas Čeiss, lai atrisinātu pazudušās statujas noslēpumu... un uzbūvētu gluži jaunu Zinātnes centru, lai palīdzētu izmeklēt.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni Rablam gatavo pārsteigumu - uzkodu mašīnu, bet vai Rabls neko nenojautīs?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Pēc piedzīvotām likstām Barbabravo vairs nemaz nespēj pārtapt. Visa ģimene dodas viņam palīgā. Barbabravo nespēj nosēdēt mierā un ilgi koncentrēties vienai nodarbei. Barbalala piedāvā iemācīt viņam kontroli. Vai viņai izdosies?

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Karla jaunā restorāna būvdarbos notiek paukšķīgs pavērsiens. Rabls un viņa komanda ķeras pie uzkopšanas. Ziepains negadījums izraisa slidenas sekas visā Celtnieklīcī. Vai suņuki paspēs tās novērst pirms mēres Greitvejas lielā lēciena?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcis gaida iemīļotas TV zvaigznes jauno filmu. Bet vispirms vajadzīgs kinoteātris, kur to skatīties! Vectēvs pastāsta suņukiem par apslēptiem dārgumiem. Lai tos atrastu, komandai jāstrādā ķepu ķepā!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš atrod apburošu aksolotla mazuli. Viņi dodas ceļā, lai nogādātu mazo nerātni mājās. Lielais Sarkanais Cālis iekļūst milzīgā burbulī, kurš viņu nes taisnā ceļā uz vulkānu! Lai viņu glābtu, arī Dorai nākas pacelties gaisā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un tētis netiek prom attāla asteroīda. Tims, Kaja un Tomijs cenšas dabūt laukā bumbu no mammas istabas. Tims cenšas dabūt lejā Tijas jauno balonu, kas ieķēries kokā.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni atrod dinozauru kaulus un nolemj uzcelt dinozauru muzeju. Kad Omars salauž kāju, kucēniem jānodrošina rampas, lai viņš tomēr spētu turpināt piegādāt pastu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Dullo vecāku" galvenais varonis ir desmit gadus vecs zēns Timijs, kurš dzīvo izdomātā pilsētā Dimsdeilā, un tur viņam neklājas viegli. Timija dzīve ir bēdīga, jo vecāki reti kad ir mājās, viņu pieskata Vikija, 16 gadus veca ļauna auklīte, viņš pastāvīgi tiek apsmiets, viņu moka arī skolotājs Krokera kungs. Bet viss mainās, kad viņam uzrodas divi laumiņu krustvecāki - Kosmo, viņa sieva Vanda un vēlāk - viņu dēls Pufs. Timijs apjauš, ka laumiņu krustvecāki noteiktās robežās spēj piepildīt visas viņa vēlēšanās. Tomēr Timijs vēl ir maziņš un reizēm ievēlas ko tādu, kas netīši noved pie nepatikšanām.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš pieskata krokodilu bērneļus. Dora un Zābaciņš pierunā Trolli nogaršot empanadu Benija kioskā. Zābaciņš uzlaiko Tiko izgudrotus zābakus. Dvīņi priecājas par savu pirmo pinjatu, bet neviens nezina, kā to dabūt vaļā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo noķer mistisku maskētu vandāli, kurš cenšas bēgt pēc mājas apzīmēšanas. Pie lietas ķeras detektīvs un doktors. // Barbabravo mīļākā mašīna pazūd no viesistabas. To meklējot Barbabravo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais zem dīvāna atrod dīvainu caurumu. Ja nu mašīna aizkrita līdz zemes centram?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Haizivsuns izmisīgi vēlas palīdzēt kaimiņam mākslas projektā, bet kaimiņš nemaz nevēlas viņa palīdzību.

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Haizivsuns nejauši izdzēš Maksa mammas darba video un kopā ar Maksu cenšas nofilmēt jaunu reportāžu ar komandas palīdzību.

programme.title: Haizivsuns
programme.desc: Haizivsunim apnīk, ka Miai ļoti patīk viņu ņurcīt. Viņš atrod Haizivsuņa rotaļlietu, bet ātri kļūst greizsirdīgs, kad Mia pievēršas mantiņai.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī.
